text.title: LinkedIn Ads Campaign Strategy Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real ads-linkedin-ads engagements. Each pairs a symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Cold interest+title targeting with no account list; CPL looks fine but no SQL conversion.
antipattern.root-cause: Author skipped account-list seeding because list-building is slow.
antipattern.fix: Build matched-account list of 100-1000 ICP companies before any broad targeting; cap broad to 25% budget.

antipattern.symptom: Report shows cost-per-lead $80; sales rejects 90% of leads.
antipattern.root-cause: Lead-quality metrics not wired; reporting on CPL only.
antipattern.fix: Wire CRM MQL/SQL events back to LinkedIn via offline conversion API; report cost-per-MQL + MQL→SQL.

antipattern.symptom: Conversation ads to cold audiences; high spam complaint rate; account flagged.
antipattern.fix: Conversation / Message ads ONLY to warm matched audiences (engaged / visited site / opened past lead form).
